sections.paragraph:
- Original: παγιδεύω

- Transliteration: Pagideuo

- Phonetic: pag-id-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to ensnare, entrap

a. of birds

2. metaph. of the attempt to elicit from one some remark which can be turned into an accusation against him

- Origin: from G3803

- TDNT entry: 14:55,8

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3803; to ensnare (figuratively): - entangle.
